608 TRNSFSN_DSCHRG_CD TRNSFSN_DSCHRG_CD Other: Transfusions (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving transfustions. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
609 DLYS_ADMSN_CD DLYS_ADMSN_CD Other: Dialysis (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving dialysis. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
